non_claims: The manifest freezes common fixtures; it does not prove filtering correctness.
BayesFilter and FilterFlow are not oracles.
Student implementations are terminal peer comparators only.
purpose: Freeze P1-P5 BayesFilter/FilterFlow common-sense tie-out fixtures before terminal P6 student repetition.
